seoTitle: Clinton vs Clinton Centre — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clinton and Clinton Centre. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clinton vs Clinton Centre: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clinton and Clinton Centre.
heading: Clinton vs Clinton Centre — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clinton, South Australia and Clinton Centre, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clinton Centre has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Clinton (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clinton or Clinton Centre safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clinton has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Clinton Centre scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clinton scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Clinton Centre scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clinton or Clinton Centre?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clinton Centre has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
